title: cyclodium serra
intro: Cyclodium serra is a type of fern species native to tropical Asia, characterized by its unique fronds with serrated edges and a creeping rhizome. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Cyclodium serra include its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects, which may help to reduce pain and alleviate symptoms of various diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often dried and used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
